message:
style: rustfmt reflow of multi-arg emit_tier! and chained method calls

No semantic change. rustfmt pass picking up three drift sites where
overlong single-line macro invocations and a chained
.recv_timeout(…).unwrap_or_else(…) block were formatted inline:

- src/indexer/lexical_generation.rs: two
  emit_tier!(debug|warn, "…") calls in the lexical-cleanup
  classification branch reflowed so the tier identifier and the
  message live on separate lines, matching the surrounding style.
- src/indexer/mod.rs: the bytes-in-flight wxsy8 regression guard's
  result_rx.recv_timeout(...).unwrap_or_else(...) block reflowed
  so each method call owns its own line, keeping the panic message
  indentation consistent with the surrounding unwrap_or_else
  arms.
- src/indexer/refresh_ledger.rs: the two long-line emit_tier! calls
  in RefreshLedgerEvidenceComparison's slowdown / improvement
  thresholds reflowed with the tier identifier on its own line.

cargo fmt --check now passes again on these files without
proposing a follow-up. No logic, control flow, or trace output
changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
